items.title: STREAM data center study draws fire in new letter to officials
items.dek: Critics say the analysis understates power and traffic burdens on nearby residents. The letter urges local leaders to demand better data before any approvals. The dispute adds to growing pushback against the project in the area.
items.source_title: Letter: STREAM data center study is misleading - TheDailyNewsOnline.com
items.judge_note: A letter criticizing a study is incremental opposition activity rather than a concrete decision or filing, but it's document-based and adds a specific developme
